stemHtml: A pilot is flying VFR in VMC at 1500 ft above ground, passing small separated villages. The pilot chose a church tower in such a village as a turning point for a new course. After completing the turn and flying towards the next waypoint, which is shown on the chart as a framework tower, the pilot is not able to find this tower at the expected time overhead. What is a likely reason for this navigation error?

options.a: The pilot changed course at a wrong village.
options.b: The vertical visibility was not sufficient to recognize the waypoints.
options.c: It is hard to recognize church towers in villages.
options.d: The framework tower is hidden behind buildings of the same height.
